violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Table near the pizza oven was found with dirty pizza slicers. Vegetable slicer was also found with food debris. These food contact surfaces should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outer surfaces of refrigerated units and covers for portable fans were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor throughout the kitchen was found dirty. Floors should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Vegetable chopper and pizza slicer were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outer surfaces of equipment were found dirty throughout the kitchen. Table with the pizza ovens and table next to the pizza ovens were also found dirty. These areas should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the hood ventilation system were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Cardboard rounds found stored on a dirty shelf next to the pizza ovens. Single use items should be stored in a clean location.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Handwashing sink in the kitchen was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
